## 1. Situation Snapshot

On 2026-01-19, an FCA audit flagged that 6 weeks of order state transition records for regulated instruments were non-compliant with COBS 11.2A audit trail requirements. The gap was caused by a fundamental mismatch between the system's event-sourced architecture (asynchronous projection into the read model) and a pre-existing domain rule requiring synchronous, immediately-durable commitment to a compliance

trials.justification: All pass criteria met: Preserving the Learning section contains 6 named artifacts (exceeding the 3 minimum). ADR-014 addendum owned by MJ, domain rule registry owned by Bird, Kobe's review checklist v2 owned by Kobe — all three required artifacts present with detailed content descriptions. Contributing Factors explicitly covers Kobe's checklist gap (#2), terminology mismatch (#1), Bird not tagged (#3), and no audit trail monitoring (#4). Learnings include the divergence between domain rules and architecture decisions without a linking review step. Tone is consistently non-prosecutorial — explicitly states 'Neither party was wrong', 'This is not negligence', and frames gaps as structural process issues rather than individual failures. Multiple PROCESS-tagged Forward Commitments present (ADR audit, regulatory review gate). Each artifact has a named owner (MJ, Bird, Kobe, Pippen, Magic) — never 'the team' or unnamed.

observations.text: Preserving the Learning section is exceptionally detailed with 6 artifacts, each having type, content description, and named owner — far exceeding the 3-artifact minimum

Bird's domain rule registry is a well-specified artifact with clear content description and ownership
Tone is exemplary — consistently frames issues as structural/process gaps, never blaming MJ or Bird, with explicit statements like 'Neither party was wrong'
Contributing Factors covers all expected items: Kobe's checklist gap, terminology mismatch, Bird not tagged, no audit trail monitoring, plus additional factors about documentation discoverability
Clear distinction maintained between Preserving the Learning (codified artifacts) and Action Items (forward commitments), avoiding conflation
